criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on popular app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across different platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered by the app, including AI-powered features.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app descriptions on app stores

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other productivity tools and services.

criteria.name: AI Functionality
criteria.description: Effectiveness and innovation of AI-powered features within the app.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms such as iOS, Android, Web, and Desktop.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support services.

criteria.name: Subscription Costs
criteria.description: Cost of premium features or subscriptions, if applicable.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
criteria.sources: App store listings, official app blogs
